market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
articles.description: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.

articles.title: Bitcoin weekly close above $63K amid RSI divergence may be bottom signal: Data
articles.description: Bitcoin's repeated weekly candle close above $63,000 align with signals that may mark a market bottom.

articles.title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open-source AI lab
articles.description: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation talent exodus sparks fresh debate over leadership
articles.description: The Ethereum community is once again debating the future of the foundation after co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang announced she would step down.

articles.title: Crypto's second U.S. lobbying front — tax policy — sees industry push on mining, staking
articles.description: The crypto sector's leading U.S. advocacy groups asked the U.S. House's tax committee to advance a bill to clarify treatment of assets from mining and staking.

articles.title: Bitcoin price taps $65.5K as Iran deal sees oil drop toward 16-week low
articles.description: Bitcoin sought a breakout toward a potential BTC price target near $70,000 as Iran news sent oil toward its lowest levels since early March.

articles.title: WhatsApp gets new chief as Meta taps India’s CRED founder Kunal Shah, and invests $900M in startup
articles.description: WhatsApp gets a new boss, as Will Cathcart moves to a new role at Meta, while Shah steps down as CEO of Indian fintech giant CRED to replace Cathcart.

articles.title: Anchorage aims to bring banks onchain with new tokenized deposit platform
articles.description: The crypto bank aims to help financial institutions offer round-the-clock payments and settlement without replacing their core systems.

articles.title: Why Google search can be a crypto wallet risk
articles.description: Think your wallet is safe? A major crypto risk may start with a Google search and one wrong click.

articles.title: 恆星並非被動存在，最新研究揭示年輕星團才是驅動星系演化的幕後推手
articles.description: 最新研究利用美國國家航空暨太空總署（NASA）的詹姆斯·韋伯（JWST）與哈伯太空望遠鏡（HST）觀測資料，分 […]

articles.title: Instagram looks to take on streaming services with longer-form, episodic and live formats for its TV app
articles.description: Instagram is coming for streaming services like Netflix and Amazon Prime Video as it sets its ambitions for living room viewing.

articles.title: 扛不住通膨與成本壓力，聯發科通知客戶調漲晶片價格
articles.description: 受到全球通膨與供應鏈動盪的影響，國內IC設計龍頭聯發科近期證實已難以獨自吸收成本，正式向客戶發布通知函，預告將 […]

articles.title: Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets
articles.description: Enso launched access to over 500 tokenized assets and US stocks, citing a growing demand for US equity exposure among European investors.

articles.title: MoneyGram joins Solana as validator amid stablecoin payment push
articles.description: The remittances firm has become a validator on the Solana blockchain, helping process and secure transactions as it expands its stablecoin payments strategy.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Social trading platform Fomo raises $75M, reaches $550M valuation
articles.description: The Series B round values the social trading and token discovery platform at $550 million as crypto venture funding remains active in 2026.

articles.title: OKX and NYSE partner to bridge tradfi and crypto markets in joint venture led by Andrew Cuomo
articles.description: The goal is to enable OKX’s 120 million global users to access ICE futures and NYSE tokenized equities markets, the two U.S. companies announced.

articles.title: Seedcamp raises $320M for its new fund to expand its US footprint
articles.description: After 18 years of focusing on Europe, early-stage investor Seedcamp said that it has raised $320 million for its latest fund which will see it expanding its presence in the United States.

articles.title: Strategy adds $300M to USD Reserve, acquires 520 BTC
articles.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy boosted its USD Reserve to $1.4 billion and added 520 Bitcoin, funded through $335.5 million in MSTR share sales.

articles.title: Bitmine added $92 million of ETH, with Tom Lee continuing to believe in 'crypto spring'
articles.description: The largest Ethereum treasury firm slowed its buying pace but remains on track to reach its goal of owning 5% of ETH supply.
